wood.name: Wood
wood.description: Used to construct buildings, ships, and many military units.

stone.name: Stone
stone.description: Used for defensive structures and heavy construction.

metal.name: Metal
metal.description: Used to forge weapons, armor, and advanced troops.

gold.name: Gold
gold.description: A universal currency used for trade, troop recruitment, and special effects.

magic.name: Magic
magic.description: A mystical resource required for magical units, champion abilities, and powerful cards.

bread.description: Feeds troops. Counts toward the Grand Feast.
